sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74036" key="o)neirolesxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνειρο-λεσχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talking in dreams,</tr_> ibid., dub. l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
